treatment_solution: Early-stage control for Mango___Powdery_Mildew: apply light preventive dose of Spray sulfur fungicide and monitor crop weekly
Moderate infection of Mango___Powdery_Mildew: apply recommended field dose of Spray sulfur fungicide twice at 7-day interval
Severe spread of Mango___Powdery_Mildew: apply systemic fungicide schedule using Spray sulfur fungicide immediately and repeat after 5 days
